---
title: Evolution of inter-city network
author: Jiho Yeo
date: '2020-03-01'
slug: evolution-of-inter-city-network
categories: []
tags:
  - complex network
subtitle: 'Weighted network analysis of inter-city travel network'
summary: 'Weighted network analysis of inter-city travel network'
authors: []
lastmod: '2020-03-01T22:56:55+09:00'
featured: no

# Featured image
# To use, add an image named `featured.jpg/png` to your page's folder.
# Focal points: Smart, Center, TopLeft, Top, TopRight, Left, Right, BottomLeft, Bottom, BottomRight.

image:
  caption: "dfdff"
  focal_point: 
  preview_only: no
  
# Projects (optional).
#   Associate this post with one or more of your projects.
#   Simply enter your project's folder or file name without extension.
#   E.g. `projects = ["internal-project"]` references `content/project/deep-learning/index.md`.
#   Otherwise, set `projects = []`.
projects: []
---

## Research summary

[Dashboard](/html/Inter-city_travel_network.html)
